AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Planning a healthy snack? Reach for Kanzi Apple. Its sweet and tangy taste makes it a delicious and convenient choice for any day of the week. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Kanzi apples have a delicious sweet and tangy taste, with their flavour coming from the variety’s parents - the sweet Gala and the tangy Braeburn.  

How to Pick:
Apples should be bright and crunchy, with a tight skin and juicy flesh. Our apples have a natural shine and no added wax.

How to Store:
Storing your apples in the fridge will keep them crisp and fresh for longer.
Consume apples within 2 weeks for the best eating experience.

Where it's Grown:
Our hand picked apples are 100% Australian grown. Our expert growers pick them from trees in the colder climate regions of Australia to ensure they have the best flavour, colour and firmness.

Health Benefits:
No matter the variety, apples contain fibre, that aids in healthy digestion, and vitamin C, to support the immune system*

*Based on one medium apple (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store Granny Smith apples in the refrigerator to maintain their crispness and flavour. Keep them separate from other fruits to prevent premature ripening.

</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, sauté, microwave.

</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> Grown with care in Australia.

</section>

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Planning a fresh meal? Reach for Avocado Fresh. Its fresh taste makes it a simple choice for any day of the week. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Avocado Fresh 5 pack provides creamy, versatile fruit with a mild, buttery flavour. These avocados are perfect for adding a rich texture and wholesome goodness to your meals, whether mashed, sliced, or diced. They are a popular choice for many recipes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose avocados that feel firm but yield gently to pressure when ripe. Skin colour varies by variety, often darkening as they mature. Avoid any with soft spots or visible blemishes for best quality.

</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store firm avocados at room temperature to ripen naturally. Once ripe, refrigerate to maintain freshness for several days. For cut avocados, keep the pit in, add a squeeze of lemon juice, and wrap tightly to prevent browning.</section>

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths Red Onions Bag' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths Red Onions are your fresh choice for enhancing your meals. They add natural flavour, making them simple to prepare and enjoy. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Red Onions are a kitchen essential, known for their vibrant purple-red skin and mild, slightly sweet flavour. These versatile onions add a delightful crunch and colour to many dishes, perfect for both raw and cooked applications. They are a popular choice for salads, marinades, and roasted vegetable medleys.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose red onions that are firm and dry, with smooth, intact skins. Avoid any with soft spots, sprouts, or mould, as these indicate they are past their prime.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store red onions in a cool, dry, and well-ventilated place away from direct sunlight. Do not store them in the refrigerator, as this can reduce their shelf life and alter their texture. They will keep fresh for several weeks when stored correctly.
</section>

<section><header>How to Prepare:</header> To prepare, carefully peel away the outer layers of skin. Slice, dice, or chop the onion according to your recipe's requirements. Red onions can be finely sliced for salads or chopped for cooking, adding flavour and texture.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy red onions raw in salads, sandwiches, and as a garnish for tacos or burgers. They also caramelise beautifully when cooked, adding sweetness to stir-fries, roasts, and pizzas. Use them to create flavourful sauces, dressings, and marinades.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, barbecue, caramelise, grill, roast, sauté, stir-fry.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Woolworths Green Asparagus Bunch. A versatile vegetable with fresh spears, it's ideal for any meal. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Green Asparagus provides tender, vibrant green spears with a distinct, fresh flavour, perfect for adding elegance and nutrition to meals.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm, bright green spears with tightly closed tips. Avoid limp or discoloured ones.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store asparagus in the refrigerator. Stand upright in water, cover tips loosely. Consume within a few days.
</section>

<section><header>How to Prepare:</header> Wash spears thoroughly. Snap or cut off woody ends where they naturally break.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy as a simple steamed or roasted side, or add to salads, pasta, and stir-fries. Pairs well with lemon, garlic, and eggs.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, blanch, boil, grill, microwave, roast, sauté, steam.

</section>
